svg.text: Scale 4:1 (4 px/mm) | All dims in mm

g.text: 1. Rack holds 10 Beduan solenoid valves (5W x 2H grid)
3. QC fittings extend along Y axis (front/rear)
4. Spade connector flat faces parallel to X-Z plane
5. Female spades slide on/off along Y (front/rear)
6. Cable routing channels on rack sides (20 wires)
7. L-shaped saddle cradles with retention clips
8. Blue collet ring marks inlet side (front)
10. Mounts via M3 screws into heat-set inserts
With QC fittings: ~32.71W x 68D x 56.0H mm
